meta.description:
Strategy Radar v0.3 — MCP Draft Writer

Exposes a single MCP tool 'write_draft_brief' that the analyst's Claude Code (using their Claude Max subscription, NO Anthropic API key) can call to write a generated draft sector brief to the Strategy Radar app.

Difference from the 18-node analysis-automation workflow: the LLM analysis (PDF extraction, opener generation, observations + actions) happens entirely in Claude Code on the analyst's machine. n8n is just the persistence hop: receive structured fields via MCP → HMAC-sign → POST /api/admin/briefs/from-n8n.

SETUP:
1. Workflow → Settings → Static Data, add:
   - N8N_CALLBACK_SECRET: same HMAC value as N8N_CALLBACK_SECRET in src/.env.local
   - APP_CALLBACK_URL: full URL to your app's endpoint, e.g.
       https://<ngrok-id>.ngrok.app/api/admin/briefs/from-n8n
     (n8n Cloud cannot reach localhost — use ngrok or a deployed app URL.)
2. Activate the workflow.
3. Click the MCP Server Trigger node → copy the MCP server URL + auth token.
4. In your terminal:
     claude mcp add strategy-radar <mcp-url> --header "Authorization: Bearer <token>"
5. Verify:  claude mcp list   → 'strategy-radar' should be listed.
6. Test by attaching a publication PDF in a Claude Code session and asking for a draft brief.

IF THE MCP SERVER TRIGGER NODE DOES NOT IMPORT CLEANLY:
Delete the imported trigger and drag a fresh 'MCP Server Trigger' (under AI / LangChain category) onto the canvas. Configure the tool 'write_draft_brief' with the JSON schema documented below. Connect its main output to 'Compose Draft' and the rest of the chain stays intact.

INPUT SCHEMA FOR write_draft_brief (Claude Code passes these):
  - naceDivision         (string)  e.g., '31' or '49'
  - openerMarkdown       (string)  200–400 word Czech opener
  - publicationBodyMarkdown (string, optional)  full Markdown of the analysed text
  - observations         (array)   3 items: {title, body}
  - closingActions       (array)   3 items: {title, body, time_horizon: '1m'|'3m'|'6-12m'}
  - jobId                (string, optional)  generated if absent

PRIVACY: this workflow does not persist any payload. Configure n8n Cloud retention policy to match.

tools.name: write_draft_brief
tools.description: Write a draft sector brief to the Strategy Radar admin DB. Use this AFTER you have read the publication, generated a Czech-language opener (200–400 words), 3 paired observations, and 3 paired actions with time-horizon tags. The draft will land at /admin in the app for analyst review and publish.

naceDivision.description: Two-digit NACE division code, e.g. '31' (furniture) or '49' (freight).

openerMarkdown.description: Lay-person sector summary in Czech, 200–400 words. Goes into the brief's 'Sektorová analýza' opener block.

publicationBodyMarkdown.description: Full Markdown of the source publication (optional). Stored as the brief's full_text_markdown.

jobId.description: Optional correlation ID. If omitted, the workflow generates one.
